column1: 1,"TPC-H","Simple Aggregation & Filtering","Pricing Summary Report - aggregates line items by return/ship status","SELECT l_returnflag, l_linestatus, SUM(l_quantity), SUM(l_extendedprice)... FROM LINEITEM","select

2,"TPC-H","Subqueries & Semi-Joins","Minimum Cost Supplier - finds suppliers for parts with minimum cost in region","SELECT s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey... WHERE ps_supplycost = (SELECT MIN(ps_supplycost)...)","select

3,"TPC-H","Basic Joins (2-4 tables)","Shipping Priority - 3-way join with aggregation and date filtering","SELECT l_orderkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue... FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM","select

4,"TPC-H","Subqueries & Semi-Joins","Order Priority Checking - counts late-delivered orders using EXISTS","SELECT o_orderpriority, COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM LINEITEM WHERE l_commitdate < l_receiptdate)","select

5,"TPC-H","Complex Joins (5+ tables)","Local Supplier Volume - 6-way join for regional revenue analysis","SELECT n_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS, LINEITEM, SUPPLIER, NATION, REGION","select

6,"TPC-H","Simple Aggregation & Filtering","Forecasting Revenue Change - single table discount impact analysis","SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue FROM LINEITEM WHERE l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01'","select
